I’m curious if I should get an EKG or monitor these better — I’m feeling generally good otherwise, just a bit concerned since I had some similar symptoms a few months ago. Thanks!

patient_message: Hey, I've been noticing some intermittent palpitations that seem to radiate to my left scapula, usually when I’m lying down or resting. They last a few seconds and then stop, but it’s been happening more frequently over the past couple of weeks. No chest pain or dizziness, but I did feel a little paresthesia in my ulnar distribution once or twice during an episode. I’m curious if I should get an EKG or monitor these better — I’m feeling generally good otherwise, just a bit concerned since I had some similar symptoms a few months ago. Thanks!
